brandDirection: Schneider Electric-inspired premium industrial technology keynote

typography.smallLabelMinimumPt: 12-14 for main content; footer intentionally smaller

layout.grid: 0.68 in outer margin, 12-column composition, consistent footer rail
layout.footer: Subtle copyright/confidentiality marking with page number

visualLanguage: Schneider Electric green accents used sparingly
photo overlays with consistent dark grading

assetTreatment.photos: cropped to 16:9, contrast graded, dark overlay in PowerPoint
assetTreatment.diagrams: redrawn as native shapes or SVG technical visuals
assetTreatment.logos: official extracted Schneider Electric assets only
